description: Build the complete admin panel at /admin with dashboard stats, user management, listing management, category management, and reports management. Protected by role check (profiles.role === 'admin'). All data fetched from Supabase.
steps: Create src/app/admin/layout.tsx: server component that checks if current user has role='admin' in profiles table. If not admin, redirect to /dashboard. Sidebar navigation with links: Dashboard, Users, Listings, Categories, Reports. Dark theme consistent with rest of app.

Create src/features/admin/actions/admin-actions.ts with server actions: getAdminStats() returns {totalUsers, totalListings, activeListings, pendingReports}, getAllUsers(page, search), updateUserRole(userId, role), deleteUser(userId), getAllListings(page, status filter), updateListingStatus(listingId, status), deleteListing(listingId), getAllCategories(), createCategory(data), updateCategory(id, data), deleteCategory(id), reorderCategories(orderedIds), getAllReports(status filter), updateReportStatus(reportId, status). All actions verify the caller is an admin first.

Create src/app/admin/page.tsx (Admin Dashboard): server component showing stats cards (Total Users, Total Listings, Active Listings, Pending Reports) fetched via getAdminStats(). Recent activity section showing latest listings and reports.

Create src/app/admin/users/page.tsx: server component with table of all users (name from profiles, email from auth metadata if available, role, joined date, listings count). Client component for actions: change role dropdown, delete button with confirmation dialog.

Create src/app/admin/listings/page.tsx: server component with table of all listings (title, seller name, category, status badge, date). Filter by status. Actions: approve (set active), reject (set removed), edit button, delete with confirmation.

Create src/app/admin/categories/page.tsx: client component showing list of categories with drag-to-reorder (or up/down buttons). Add category form (name, slug auto-generated, icon dropdown, description). Edit/delete each category.

Create src/app/admin/reports/page.tsx: server component with table of reports (reporter name, listing title, reason, status badge, date). Actions: mark resolved, mark dismissed, view listing link, remove offending listing.
Create reusable admin UI components in src/features/admin/components/: AdminStatsCard, AdminTable (generic table with pagination), StatusBadge, ConfirmDialog
Update src/middleware.ts to add /admin to PROTECTED_ROUTE_PREFIXES if not already there
acceptance_criteria: Admin layout protects all /admin/* routes (redirects non-admins)
Admin dashboard shows real stats from Supabase
Users page shows all users with role management
Listings page shows all listings with status management
Categories page allows CRUD and reordering
Reports page shows all reports with status updates
All admin actions verify admin role server-side
verification: Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx next build' in /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store and confirm it compiles without errors
